{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "PC Place is a Nigerian retailer specializing in computers, electronics, and accessories, with both an online store and physical locations. The company&#39;s head office is located in Ikeja, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports
	Manage daily accounting operations including accounts payable and receivable
	Reconcile bank statements and monitor cash flow
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
	Handle payroll processing and statutory deductions (e.g., PAYE, VAT, pensions)
	Ensure compliance with relevant financial regulations and tax laws
	Assist with budgeting and financial forecasting
	Conduct financial analysis and provide insights to management
	Maintain proper documentation of financial transactions
	Liaise with auditors, banks, and regulatory authorities
	Monitor expenses and ensure cost control measures


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	2&ndash;5 years of relevant accounting experience
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and tax laws
	Excellent analytical and numerical skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Good communication and organizational skills


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;pcplacenigeria@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail email.",

Accountant Job at PC Place Nigeria




        
    

        
        PC Place is a Nigerian retailer specializing in computers, electronics, and accessories, with both an online store and physical locations. The company's head office is located in Ikeja, Lagos.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records and reports
	Manage daily accounting operations including accounts payable and receivable
	Reconcile bank statements and monitor cash flow
	Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements
	Handle payroll processing and statutory deductions (e.g., PAYE, VAT, pensions)
	Ensure compliance with relevant financial regulations and tax laws
	Assist with budgeting and financial forecasting
	Conduct financial analysis and provide insights to management
	Maintain proper documentation of financial transactions
	Liaise with auditors, banks, and regulatory authorities
	Monitor expenses and ensure cost control measures


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field
	2–5 years of relevant accounting experience
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Sage)
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and tax laws
	Excellent analytical and numerical skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Good communication and organizational skills


Salary
N200,000 - N300,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer / Teacher",
  "description": "7Eleven Consultancy Services is a company that runs full HR services, but in a consulting role. Such services are recruitment, organisation development, payroll management, training, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer / Teacher

Job Location:&nbsp;Alagbado, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Administrative &amp; Accounting Duties:


	Manage daily administrative operations of the school.
	Maintain accurate records of students, staff, and school activities.
	Handle correspondence, documentation, and filing systems.
	Support school management in planning and executing academic and non-academic activities.
	Monitor attendance records for staff and students.
	Assist in organizing meetings, events, and examinations.
	Ensure compliance with school policies and regulatory requirements.
	Maintain accurate financial records, including income and expenditure.
	Record school fees, payments, and other revenue streams.
	Issue receipts and track outstanding fees.
	Prepare basic financial reports (daily, weekly, or monthly).
	Teach assigned subjects.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, NCE, or HND with 1-2 years of experience.
	Candidates leaving around Ijaiye-Ojokoro, Alagbado, Kola, Alakuko and its environs will be given high priority.


Salary
N50,000 - N60,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;7elevenconsult@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Candidates leaving around Ijaiye-Ojokoro, Alagbado, Kola, Alakuko and its environs will be given high priority.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",

    "name": "7Eleven Consultancy Services"
    
  },

Administrative Officer / Teacher Job at 7Eleven Consultancy Services




        
    

        
        7Eleven Consultancy Services is a company that runs full HR services, but in a consulting role. Such services are recruitment, organisation development, payroll management, training, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer / Teacher

Job Location: Alagbado, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Administrative & Accounting Duties:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage daily administrative operations of the school.
	Maintain accurate records of students, staff, and school activities.
	Handle correspondence, documentation, and filing systems.
	Support school management in planning and executing academic and non-academic activities.
	Monitor attendance records for staff and students.
	Assist in organizing meetings, events, and examinations.
	Ensure compliance with school policies and regulatory requirements.
	Maintain accurate financial records, including income and expenditure.
	Record school fees, payments, and other revenue streams.
	Issue receipts and track outstanding fees.
	Prepare basic financial reports (daily, weekly, or monthly).
	Teach assigned subjects.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an OND, NCE, or HND with 1-2 years of experience.
	Candidates leaving around Ijaiye-Ojokoro, Alagbado, Kola, Alakuko and its environs will be given high priority.


Salary
N50,000 - N60,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Candidates leaving around Ijaiye-Ojokoro, Alagbado, Kola, Alakuko and its environs will be given high priority.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

Beyond the classroom, we emphasize research, community engagement, and global collaboration as vital pillars of our mission. With a strong commitment to social responsibility and lifelong learning, we equip our students not only with the skills for success but also with the vision and passion to make a lasting impact in an ever-evolving world.

We invite applications from suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Maiduguri, Borno
Job type: Full time
Department: Registry

Requirements


	Candidates should possess a BA/B.Sc. in Marketing, Economics, Purchasing and Supply, Public Relations/Advertising, Business Management/Administration, Entrepreneurship or Capital Market
	Qualification obtained from a recognised institution
	NYSC discharge or exemption certificate
	Relevant work experience


Documents Required
Please prepare the following documents before starting your application:


	Personal Documents:
	
		Current passport photograph
		Birth certificate or declaration of age
		Indigene certificate
		National ID or International Passport.
	
	
	Academic Documents:
	
		Primary School Certificate
		O&#39;Level Certificate (WAEC/NECO)
		Tertiary Institution Certificates
		NYSC Discharge Certificate.
	
	


Note


	All applicants must possess the required qualifications before the closing date of the application.
	Candidates will be required to present original copies of all credentials during the interview process.

Procurement Officer Job at University of Maiduguri




        
    

        
        The University of Maiduguri is dedicated to fostering intellectual growth and academic excellence through a world-class education rooted in critical thinking, innovation, and ethical leadership. Our vibrant learning environment encourages students to realize their full potential, guided by renowned faculty and enriched by diverse perspectives that prepare them to lead and excel in their chosen fields.

Beyond the classroom, we emphasize research, community engagement, and global collaboration as vital pillars of our mission. With a strong commitment to social responsibility and lifelong learning, we equip our students not only with the skills for success but also with the vision and passion to make a lasting impact in an ever-evolving world.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We invite applications from suitably qualified candidates for the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Officer

Job Location: Maiduguri, Borno
Job type: Full time
Department: Registry

Requirements


	Candidates should possess a BA/B.Sc. in Marketing, Economics, Purchasing and Supply, Public Relations/Advertising, Business Management/Administration, Entrepreneurship or Capital Market
	Qualification obtained from a recognised institution
	NYSC discharge or exemption certificate
	Relevant work experience


Documents Required
Please prepare the following documents before starting your application:


	Personal Documents:
	
		Current passport photograph
		Birth certificate or declaration of age
		Indigene certificate
		National ID or International Passport.
	
	
	Academic Documents:
	
		Primary School Certificate
		O'Level Certificate (WAEC/NECO)
		Tertiary Institution Certificates
		NYSC Discharge Certificate.
	
	


Note


	All applicants must possess the required qualifications before the closing date of the application.
	Candidates will be required to present original copies of all credentials during the interview process.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Registered Nurse",
  "description": "Naturapimp is a trichology and wellness clinic specializing in scalp assessment and targeted treatments, including PRP microneedling, LED therapy, and scalp detox procedures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Nurse

Job Location:&nbsp;Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities


	Conduct thorough client intake, including medical history, scalp assessment, and evaluation of symptoms.
	Assist in administering treatments such as PRP microneedling, LED therapy, and scalp detox procedures.
	Prepare, sanitize, and sterilize all tools, equipment, and treatment areas in accordance with safety and hygiene standards.
	Educate clients on recommended products, aftercare routines, and personalized treatment plans.
	Monitor client progress over time and promptly report any concerns or irregularities.
	Maintain accurate, up-to-date client records and treatment documentation.
	Schedule client appointments and manage follow-ups to ensure continuity of care.
	Ensure compliance with all health, safety, and regulatory guidelines within the clinic.
	Provide excellent customer service by addressing client inquiries, concerns, and ensuring a positive overall experience.


Job Requirements


	Minimum of a Diploma or certification in Cosmetology, Esthetics, Trichology, Nursing, or a related field.
	Valid professional license or certification (where required by local regulations).
	Certification or training in microneedling, PRP treatments, or other advanced scalp therapies is an added advantage.
	Basic knowledge of infection control and sterilization procedures.
	First Aid and CPR certification is a plus.
	Ongoing professional development or continuing education in hair and scalp treatments is preferred.
	Strong knowledge of scalp health, hair care practices, and basic dermatological principles.
	Hands-on experience assisting with aesthetic or trichology treatments (e.g., microneedling, PRP, LED therapy) is an advantage.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to educate and build trust with clients.
	High attention to detail and strong organizational skills for accurate record-keeping.
	Ability to maintain strict hygiene, sanitation, and safety standards.
	Strong customer service orientation with a professional and empathetic approach.
	Ability to monitor client progress and identify potential concerns or adverse reactions.
	Basic administrative skills, including appointment scheduling and inventory tracking.
	Physical stamina to stand for extended periods and perform hands-on treatments.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;qualitytalentzone@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Registered Nurse Job at Naturapimp




        
    

        
        Naturapimp is a trichology and wellness clinic specializing in scalp assessment and targeted treatments, including PRP microneedling, LED therapy, and scalp detox procedures.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Nurse

Job Location: Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Conduct thorough client intake, including medical history, scalp assessment, and evaluation of symptoms.
	Assist in administering treatments such as PRP microneedling, LED therapy, and scalp detox procedures.
	Prepare, sanitize, and sterilize all tools, equipment, and treatment areas in accordance with safety and hygiene standards.
	Educate clients on recommended products, aftercare routines, and personalized treatment plans.
	Monitor client progress over time and promptly report any concerns or irregularities.
	Maintain accurate, up-to-date client records and treatment documentation.
	Schedule client appointments and manage follow-ups to ensure continuity of care.
	Ensure compliance with all health, safety, and regulatory guidelines within the clinic.
	Provide excellent customer service by addressing client inquiries, concerns, and ensuring a positive overall experience.


Job Requirements


	Minimum of a Diploma or certification in Cosmetology, Esthetics, Trichology, Nursing, or a related field.
	Valid professional license or certification (where required by local regulations).
	Certification or training in microneedling, PRP treatments, or other advanced scalp therapies is an added advantage.
	Basic knowledge of infection control and sterilization procedures.
	First Aid and CPR certification is a plus.
	Ongoing professional development or continuing education in hair and scalp treatments is preferred.
	Strong knowledge of scalp health, hair care practices, and basic dermatological principles.
	Hands-on experience assisting with aesthetic or trichology treatments (e.g., microneedling, PRP, LED therapy) is an advantage.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to educate and build trust with clients.
	High attention to detail and strong organizational skills for accurate record-keeping.
	Ability to maintain strict hygiene, sanitation, and safety standards.
	Strong customer service orientation with a professional and empathetic approach.
	Ability to monitor client progress and identify potential concerns or adverse reactions.
	Basic administrative skills, including appointment scheduling and inventory tracking.
	Physical stamina to stand for extended periods and perform hands-on treatments.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Private Wealth Manager",
  "description": "UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning &amp; Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d&rsquo;etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.

We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation&rsquo;s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil &amp; gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Private Wealth Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	The Private Wealth Manager will manage and grow a portfolio of High-Net-Worth Individuals (HNWIs) and institutional clients by delivering tailored investment solutions, driving Assets Under Management (AUM) growth, and building long-term client relationships.


Key Responsibilities


	Build and maintain strong relationships with HNWI and institutional clients
	Provide tailored investment advice across multiple asset classes
	Identify and onboard new clients to drive AUM growth
	Monitor portfolio performance and provide regular client updates
	Coordinate with internal teams to execute client mandates
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements (KYC, AML, etc.)
	Stay updated on market trends and provide strategic insights


Performance Metrics


	Growth in Assets Under Management (AUM)
	Client acquisition and retention
	Revenue generation
	Compliance adherence


Key Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
	5&ndash;10 years of experience in wealth or asset management
	Proven experience managing HNWI or institutional portfolios
	Relevant certifications (CFA, CIS, SEC license) are an advantage
	Deep knowledge of financial markets and investment products
	Business development and sales acumen


Core Competencies:


	Strong relationship management and communication skills
	Deep knowledge of financial markets and investment products
	Business development and sales skills
	High level of professionalism and ethical standards.
",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-22",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "UnoCasa Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",

       "postalCode": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {

    "value": "197301"

Private Wealth Manager Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        UnoCasa is a full service Human Resources Consultancy business with focus on Talent Acquisition, Learning & Development and Consultancy services. Our raison d’etre is the notion that your people are your advantage and proffer people-centric solutions to ensure your team accomplish your business goals.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are not your run of the mill HR Company, we believe in team diversity and teamwork; we believe that the workplace should have an ambience that inspires productivity of the team; and the application of technologies to enhance efficiency. We know that every business is unique and tailor HR solutions to your organisation’s needs. Our clients are in various sectors not limited to engineering, education, health oil & gas, government, media, finance, retail, lifestyle, consultancy firms and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Private Wealth Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)

Job Summary


	The Private Wealth Manager will manage and grow a portfolio of High-Net-Worth Individuals (HNWIs) and institutional clients by delivering tailored investment solutions, driving Assets Under Management (AUM) growth, and building long-term client relationships.


Key Responsibilities


	Build and maintain strong relationships with HNWI and institutional clients
	Provide tailored investment advice across multiple asset classes
	Identify and onboard new clients to drive AUM growth
	Monitor portfolio performance and provide regular client updates
	Coordinate with internal teams to execute client mandates
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements (KYC, AML, etc.)
	Stay updated on market trends and provide strategic insights


Performance Metrics


	Growth in Assets Under Management (AUM)
	Client acquisition and retention
	Revenue generation
	Compliance adherence


Key Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Economics, Business, or related field
	5–10 years of experience in wealth or asset management
	Proven experience managing HNWI or institutional portfolios
	Relevant certifications (CFA, CIS, SEC license) are an advantage
	Deep knowledge of financial markets and investment products
	Business development and sales acumen


Core Competencies:


	Strong relationship management and communication skills
	Deep knowledge of financial markets and investment products
	Business development and sales skills
	High level of professionalism and ethical standards.
